MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To Aug-28-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRANDON CARR, Esq. of the Law Offices of Arash Khorsandi, PC (Tel: 310-277-7529) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As to Plaintiff Timothy Wayne Paige.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court instructs plaintiff's counsel that attorney Roberto Dominguez Quiroga (as the name of the attorney stated as the movant on the filed motion) is to call the Court's chambers are 10:45 a.m. for an in camera discussion to be conducted.

In camera discussion held.

The Court rules as follows: Roberto Dominguz Quiroga's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Timothy Wayne Paige is granted.

Movant to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
